TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Calvin_Booth, title = Calvin_Booth, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Calvin_Booth} }

S.FORM: Calvin Booth sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1976, ryax sa tay 7 nqu tay 5, Calvin Booth, squliq na p'unro. qyanux na hopa pqwasan biru Booth mqbaq biru beh Penn State hopa pqwasan biru. 1998 kawas maki Bachelor of Arts wal magal hopa na pqwasan biru. 2012-2013 kawas pspung na mzyu mari lga,t'aring praw gleng еі° bincyogun nya. qutux kawas lga,hiya ga musa Minnesota kinblayqan pincyuwagan sa qnxan niya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing masuq mspung mari sa pspngan mari na maycyugal byacing lga cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players 0

Calvin Booth sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1976, ryax sa tay 7 nqu tay 5, Calvin Booth, squliq na p'unro. qyanux na hopa pqwasan biru Booth mqbaq biru beh Penn State hopa pqwasan biru. 1998 kawas maki Bachelor of Arts wal magal hopa na pqwasan biru. 2012-2013 kawas pspung na mzyu mari lga,t'aring praw gleng еі° bincyogun nya. qutux kawas lga,hiya ga musa Minnesota kinblayqan pincyuwagan sa qnxan niya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing masuq mspung mari sa pspngan mari na maycyugal byacing lga cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players 0
S.PHON: КҰ~КЁal*in ОІootД§ s~Й•raral Д§jaК”ЙЈa s~Й•is~Й•juw na nОІa, wal malaxmis~Й•uq qanij la. kawas~Й• taj ****, rjax s~Й•a taj * nqu taj *, КҰ~КЁal*in ОІootД§, s~Й•quliq na pК”unro. qjanux na Д§opa pqwas~Й•an ОІiru ОІootД§ mqОІaq ОІiru ОІeД§ penn s~Й•tate Д§opa pqwas~Й•an ОІiru. **** kawas~Й• maki ОІaКҰ~КЁД§elor o* arts~Й• wal maЙЈal Д§opa na pqwas~Й•an ОІiru. ****-**** kawas~Й• ps~Й•puЕӢ na mzju mari lЙЈa,tК”ariЕӢ praw ЙЈleЕӢ * ОІinКҰ~КЁjoЙЈun nja. qutux kawas~Й• lЙЈa,Д§ija ЙЈa mus~Й•a minnes~Й•ota kinОІlajqan pinКҰ~КЁjuwaЙЈan s~Й•a qnxan nijaК” ps~Й•pЕӢan mari s~Й•a maj juЙЈal jaКҰ~КЁiЕӢ mas~Й•uq ms~Й•puЕӢ mari s~Й•a ps~Й•pЕӢan mari na majКҰ~КЁjuЙЈal ОІjaКҰ~КЁiЕӢ lЙЈa КҰ~КЁinkД§ulan s~Й•a knitaК” s~Й•a ОІrОІiruК” lis~Й•ts~Й• o* national ОІas~Й•ketОІall as~Й•s~Й•oКҰ~КЁiation plajers~Й• *
